Politics.headline: US citizens were on stolen boat in deadly shooting with Cuba's coast guard
Politics.detail: Secretary of State Marco Rubio is investigating a clash where US citizens were involved in a deadly shooting with Cuba's coast guard on a stolen boat.

Politics.headline: Hillary Clinton says she answered every question in Epstein testimony and confirms Republican asked about UFOs and Pizzagate
Politics.detail: Hillary Clinton testified before the House Oversight Committee, stating she answered all questions and confirmed that a Republican representative inquired about UFOs and Pizzagate during the hearing. She also accused Republicans of a 'fishing expedition' in the Epstein testimony.

Politics.headline: Taiwan releases forced labor prevention guide for businesses
Politics.detail: Taiwan's Ministry of Labor issued a guide to help businesses prevent forced labor and reduce operational risks, in response to growing international scrutiny of migrant workers' rights in supply chains. The guide includes the International Labour Organization’s indicators, self-assessment tools, and case studies.

Politics.headline: President Lai confers decoration on Saint Vincent and the Grenadines Ambassador Andrea Clare Bowman
Politics.detail: President Lai Ching-te presented the Order of Brilliant Star with Grand Cordon to Saint Vincent and the Grenadines Ambassador Andrea Clare Bowman, acknowledging her contributions to strengthening bilateral relations between the two countries. Ambassador Bowman expressed gratitude for the nearly 45 years of diplomatic relations and emphasized the importance of protecting Taiwan's sovereignty.

Politics.headline: Bolivia resumes operational cooperation with the United States Drug Enforcement Administration (DEA)
Politics.detail: Bolivia is resuming operational cooperation with the United States Drug Enforcement Administration (DEA) to combat drug trafficking and organized crime after a 17-year suspension, which will include efforts to address money laundering linked to the illicit drug trade.

Finance & Economy.headline: Ocado to cut 1,000 jobs in £150m cost-saving drive
Finance & Economy.detail: The online retailer Ocado is planning to cut 1,000 jobs in an effort to save £150 million. The firm's automated warehouses are struggling to compete against swift deliveries from stores by bike riders.

Finance & Economy.headline: Mortgage rates fall below 6% for the first time since 2022
Finance & Economy.detail: The decline in the average 30-year mortgage rate could be good news for home shoppers as the spring home-buying season gets rolling.

Finance & Economy.headline: Analysts expect wholesale inflation to have cooled down (somewhat) in January
Finance & Economy.detail: The private credit market has grown fivefold since the 2008 financial crisis, according to the Federal Reserve, and now sits somewhere near the $2 trillion-mark globally. In the last couple weeks, though, the market has gone a bit sideways.

Finance & Economy.headline: Nvidia and other tech stocks lead Wall Street higher
Finance & Economy.detail: Nvidia's latest profit report is causing waves on Wall Street. The S&P 500 rose 0.8%.

Finance & Economy.headline: New PLI on cards as India fights China in phone race
Finance & Economy.detail: India is introducing a new Production Linked Incentive (PLI) scheme as it competes with China in the mobile phone manufacturing sector.

Science.headline: Popular Brain Supplement Linked to Shorter Lifespan in Men
Science.detail: A study of over 270,000 people found a link between higher levels of tyrosine, an amino acid in protein-rich foods, and a shorter lifespan in men.

Science.headline: Antarctica Just Saw the Fastest Glacier Collapse Ever Recorded
Science.detail: Antarctica's Hektoria Glacier retreated eight kilometers in two months, with nearly half collapsing in record time due to a flat, underwater bedrock.

Science.headline: Mosquitoes began biting humans more than a million years ago
Science.detail: Research indicates that mosquitoes started biting humans over a million years ago, much earlier than previously thought.

Science.headline: Novel delivery method bypasses blood-brain barrier to treat ALS symptoms
Science.detail: A new method has been developed to bypass the blood-brain barrier, offering a potential treatment for ALS symptoms.

Science.headline: Physicists Finally Reveal Why Sticky Tape 'Screams' When You Peel It
Science.detail: Scientists have finally figured out the physics behind the screaming sound produced when sticky tape is peeled.

Health.headline: Popular Brain Supplement Linked to Shorter Lifespan in Men
Health.detail: A study of over 270,000 people found that higher levels of tyrosine, an amino acid in protein-rich foods and marketed as a brain supplement, were linked to shorter lifespans in men.

Health.headline: The More You Fear Aging, the Faster Your Body May Age
Health.detail: Research from NYU indicates that worrying about aging, especially future health problems, may accelerate aging at the cellular level, with a study of over 700 women showing that those more anxious about aging exhibited signs of faster aging.

Health.headline: Maternity Services 'Still Failing' Women and Babies
Health.detail: A recent report indicates that maternity services continue to fall short in providing adequate care for women and babies.

Health.headline: His heart stopped in a St. John's emergency room after waiting more than 8 hours, now he's calling for change
Health.detail: After waiting over eight hours in a St. John's emergency room, Paul Reid's heart stopped, prompting him to speak out about systemic issues in the healthcare system that he believes haven't been resolved.

Health.headline: Shingles Vaccine May Slow Biological Aging and Reduce Inflammation
Health.detail: A national study of over 3,800 Americans aged 70 and older suggests that the shingles vaccine may do more than prevent rashes; it could also slow down the aging process.

Sports.headline: NFL Combine LIVE: Edge rushers putting forth solid showing
Sports.detail: NFL Draft prospects are showing their stuff in Indianapolis, from the 40-yard dash to the rest of the drills as teams evaluate this class of players.

Sports.headline: India vs Zimbabwe highlights, T20 World Cup 2026: IND beat ZIM by 72 runs in Chennai to keep semis hopes alive
Sports.detail: India defeated Zimbabwe by 72 runs in Chennai, boosting their hopes for the T20 World Cup semi-finals. The Indian team scored 256, the second-highest T20 World Cup total ever.

Sports.headline: 2026 NFL Combine Live: 40 Times, Top Performances and Instant Analysis
Sports.detail: Follow along with Sports Illustrated for all the latest from the NFL scouting combine.

Sports.headline: Highlights: India smash second-highest T20 World Cup score
Sports.detail: Highlights of India's impressive performance where they achieved the second-highest T20 World Cup score are available.

Sports.headline: 'Runners tame nationally recognized Lady Lions
Sports.detail: The UTSA softball team defeated Southeastern Louisiana, a team receiving national recognition, with a score of 2-1. Skylar Rucker delivered a two-run RBI double, securing the win for the Roadrunners.

Entertainment.headline: DJ David Guetta Secretly Welcomes Baby #4, Second Child with GF Jessica Ledon
Entertainment.detail: Famed DJ David Guetta, 58, and his girlfriend Jessica Ledon welcomed their second child together, announcing the arrival of Skyler on Instagram with photos of Jessica's baby bump and their son Cyan.

Entertainment.headline: P!nk Claps Back at Carey Hart Separation Reports: 'Fake News'
Entertainment.detail: Singer P!nk addressed reports of a separation from her husband Carey Hart, dismissing them as "fake news" in an Instagram video and highlighting more important issues.

Entertainment.headline: Asean News Headlines: HK star Sammi Cheng, 53, jokes about being 'too old' to play a hostess in new...
Entertainment.detail: Hong Kong star Sammi Cheng, 53, joked about being 'too old' to play a hostess in her new show.

Entertainment.headline: Adam Peaty's furious aunt says 'how could you?' as she brands him a 'complete and utter tool'
Entertainment.detail: Adam Peaty's aunt has publicly criticised him, branding him a 'complete and utter tool'.

Entertainment.headline: BAFTA Awards 2026: Strong words from Tourette's Syndrome campaigner John Davidson disrupts ceremony.
Entertainment.detail: Tourette's Syndrome campaigner John Davidson made strong comments which disrupted the BAFTA 2026 ceremony.

Crime & Justice.headline: Hillary Clinton tells House committee she had "no idea" about Epstein's crimes
Crime & Justice.detail: Former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton testified before the House Oversight Committee, stating she had no knowledge of Jeffrey Epstein or Ghislaine Maxwell's criminal activities, while Republicans suggest the Clintons may have information relevant to Epstein's dealings.

Crime & Justice.headline: 'Horrific facts': Sydney grandpa kidnap and murder accused in court
Crime & Justice.detail: Two men appeared in court charged with the kidnapping and murder of an 85-year-old grandfather in Sydney, in a case of mistaken identity where the intended target was a relative of a businessman and a ransom of AU$50 million was demanded.

Crime & Justice.headline: Telemedicine Company Owner Sentenced to 7 Years in Prison for $56M Medicare Fraud Scheme
Crime & Justice.detail: The owner of a telemedicine company has been sentenced to seven years in prison for a $56 million Medicare fraud scheme.

Crime & Justice.headline: Tommy Schaefer Is Returned to Chicago to Face Federal Charges for the 2014 Murder of U.S. Citizen in Bali, Indonesia
Crime & Justice.detail: Tommy Schaefer has been returned to Chicago to face federal charges related to the 2014 murder of a U.S. citizen in Bali, Indonesia.

Crime & Justice.headline: Waste trafficking driving toxic pollution and harming public health, says UNODC
Crime & Justice.detail: The UNODC reports that waste trafficking is a driver of toxic pollution, which in turn harms public health.
Crime & Justice.source: United Nations Office on Drugs and Crime

Education.headline: Taipei unveils pioneering subsidy for childcare-related work-hour cut
Education.detail: The Taipei City government is launching a pilot program to subsidize businesses that reduce daily work hours by one hour for parents of children aged 12 and below, ensuring no loss in pay, in an effort to build a supportive culture for working families. Participating businesses must implement the policy for at least 10 days per month over a three-month period without reducing employee pay, with the city government subsidizing 80 percent of the wages for the reduced work hours.

Education.headline: North Tyneside Council to pay compensation to family over SEND education failures
Education.detail: North Tyneside Council has apologized and agreed to pay a family £5,900 in recognition of the impact on the child's education after failing to provide promised specialist technology to allow a child with special educational needs to learn from home. The council failed to arrange any alternative education for 13 months due to IT security restrictions and compatibility issues, and the ombudsman found the council did not attempt to put other arrangements in place until September 2024.

Education.headline: Columbia student arrested in campus housing by ICE is released
Education.detail: Immigration officers who arrested a Columbia University student in campus housing misrepresented themselves as looking for a missing person, according to school and city officials. The student has since been released.

Education.headline: Conservatives want schools to teach this strict life path they say avoids poverty
Education.detail: Lawmakers in at least seven GOP-led states have introduced bills that would require public schools to teach a specific life path that conservatives say avoids poverty.

Education.headline: Says It Supports Career-Tech Ed. It Canceled CTE Grants Anyway.
Education.detail: Several states are eyeing property-tax caps, exemptions, or eliminating them altogether.

Lifestyle.headline: I am in my 30s, unmarried, and afraid I've missed my chance. How do I make peace with my fear?
Lifestyle.detail: Your life may not look the way you thought it would, writes advice columnist Eleanor Gordon-Smith, but whatever happens it can still be rich and fulfilling.

Lifestyle.headline: You be the judge: should my girlfriend change the way she loads the dishwasher?
Lifestyle.detail: This article discusses differing opinions on the correct way to load a dishwasher and invites readers to share their thoughts.

Lifestyle.headline: Pink denies reports that she is separated from husband Carey Hart: 'Not true'
Lifestyle.detail: The singer posted a video to her official Instagram account, describing the story as “fake news, not true”.

Lifestyle.headline: Portuguese city wins TripAdvisor 2026 Best of the Best award
Lifestyle.detail: A Portuguese city has secured a spot in TripAdvisor's 2026 Travellers' Choice Awards Best of the Best for destinations, recognized for its river views, historic hillsides and laid-back rhythm.

Lifestyle.headline: Tim Tebow tells story of Jesus through eyes of the cross in revealing new book
Lifestyle.detail: Tim Tebow's new book "If the Tree Could Speak" tells the crucifixion story of Jesus from a tree's perspective and publishes Feb. 24 with a unique take on Christian faith.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Nobody wants to defend Britain's voting system any more – but here's why I will
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The nail-biting Gorton and Denton byelection has shown the cracks in first past the post, but proportional representation isn't the answer.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: The Guardian view on maternity care failures: NHS England must do better by mothers and babies
Opinion/Editorial.detail: Systemic issues within NHS maternity care are causing unacceptable failures, and NHS England needs to take immediate action to improve the safety and well-being of mothers and babies.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Abcarian: Recent events make you wonder: How much do men really hate women?
Opinion/Editorial.detail: Recent events prompt reflection on the underlying attitudes and biases that contribute to gender inequality and discrimination.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: A jab well done: On India's Human Papillomavirus vaccination programme
Opinion/Editorial.detail: Following up of adverse events after immunisation is a must.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Government must realise that 7 shirtless Youth Congress protesters do not a national threat make
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The government should recognize that a small group of shirtless protesters does not constitute a national security threat.

World.headline: Afghanistan launches attacks against Pakistan, draws 'immediate response'
World.detail: Afghanistan says 'large-scale offensive operations' launched, and Pakistan reports inflicting 'heavy casualties' in clashes across the border. The situation has heightened tensions between the two countries.

World.headline: India beat Zimbabwe to set up virtual quarterfinal against West Indies
World.detail: India defeated Zimbabwe in a high-scoring match in Chennai, keeping their chances alive to make the T20 World Cup semi-finals. The win sets up a crucial match against the West Indies.

World.headline: Global impunity fuels Israel's illegal push to annex West Bank: Amnesty
World.detail: Amnesty International has accused the international community of failing to deter Israel's escalating annexation and apartheid policies in the West Bank. The rights group criticized the international failure to deter Israel's escalating annexation.

World.headline: Pakistan strikes Kabul hours after Afghanistan attack on border troops
World.detail: In response to an attack on its border troops, Pakistan launched strikes in Kabul. This action further escalates tensions between the two neighboring countries.

World.headline: NSW Protest laws challenged in court | Morning News Bulletin 27 February 2026
World.detail: Protest laws in New South Wales (NSW), Australia, are being challenged in court. This comes amid ongoing debates about freedom of assembly and expression.

Zimbabwe.headline: Govt warns transporters against fare hikes
Zimbabwe.detail: The government has issued a warning to transporters against increasing fares. The government is closely monitoring the situation and will take action against those found to be exploiting commuters.

Zimbabwe.headline: EU commits to Zim health funding
Zimbabwe.detail: The European Union has pledged to continue its financial support to Zimbabwe's health sector. This commitment aims to improve healthcare services and access for the population.

Zimbabwe.headline: Zim annual inflation slows further
Zimbabwe.detail: Zimbabwe's annual inflation rate has continued to decline, indicating a positive trend in the country's economic stability. This is good news for consumers and businesses alike.

Zimbabwe.headline: Pedros enters Zim, to create 600 jobs
Zimbabwe.detail: Pedros has expanded its operations into Zimbabwe, bringing with it the promise of 600 new employment opportunities. The company's entry into the market is expected to boost the local economy.

Zimbabwe.headline: Industries failing to meet effluent standards
Zimbabwe.detail: Authorities in Bulawayo have expressed concerns over widespread industrial pollution, with over half of local factories failing to comply with effluent standards. This poses a significant environmental risk.
